CadFileCreate.description:
Request body for registering a CAD file for intake.

For this phase, intake uses a bundled sample DXF fixture resolved by
sample_key. Browser file upload is documented as a later enhancement, so the
client does not pass an arbitrary storage path.
CadFileCreate.title: CadFileCreate

ChecklistDraftFindingCreate.description:
Reviewer-confirmed content for a draft finding from a checklist item.

Values may be prefilled from the checklist item, but the reviewer can edit
them. The risk level is reviewer-entered, never a system conclusion.
ChecklistDraftFindingCreate.title: ChecklistDraftFindingCreate

ChunkEmbeddingBackfillResponse.description: Summary of a chunk embedding backfill. Counts and model identity only.
ChunkEmbeddingBackfillResponse.title: ChunkEmbeddingBackfillResponse

ChunkEvidenceSearchRequest.description:
Request body for retrieval over real-derived document chunks.

query_text is required (at least two characters). mode selects keyword,
semantic, or hybrid retrieval. filters are optional and metadata-only. limit
is bounded to a safe maximum by the service. The search only covers
real-derived chunks (those built from indexed PDF page text); seeded demo
chunks are never included.
ChunkEvidenceSearchRequest.title: ChunkEvidenceSearchRequest

ChunkLinkSuggestion.description:
A reviewer-support suggestion of checklist/finding links for one chunk.

Scores are relevance hints for the reviewer, not assertions that the evidence
satisfies a checklist item or finding.
ChunkLinkSuggestion.title: ChunkLinkSuggestion

DashboardAggregate.description: Aggregate counts across a set of accessible projects.
DashboardAggregate.title: DashboardAggregate

DashboardMetrics.description: Flat per-project review-support counts. None implies a final outcome.
DashboardMetrics.title: DashboardMetrics

DashboardProjectSummary.description: A dashboard project card with safe counts and aging indicators.
DashboardProjectSummary.title: DashboardProjectSummary

DocumentChunkingSummary.description:
Summary returned when real-derived chunks are rebuilt for a document.

Reports counts and statuses only. It does not return chunk content here and
does not imply any final review outcome.
DocumentChunkingSummary.title: DocumentChunkingSummary

DocumentRegister.description: Request body for registering document metadata (no file bytes).
DocumentRegister.title: DocumentRegister

EvidenceCandidateCreate.description: Request body to save a retrieval result into the reviewer draft queue.
EvidenceCandidateCreate.title: EvidenceCandidateCreate

EvidenceCitationCreate.description:
Request body for a reviewer-selected evidence citation.

document_id is required. Provide a document_page_id or page_number to cite a
specific page; omit both to cite a document generally. quoted_excerpt is
optional and reviewer-selected. citation_type and citation_status, when set,
are validated against the review-support vocabulary.
EvidenceCitationCreate.title: EvidenceCitationCreate

EvidenceReferenceCreate.description:
Request body for a basic manual evidence reference on a finding.

This is a review-support evidence reference placeholder, not a final
citation engine. reviewer_note records why the document is relevant.
EvidenceReferenceCreate.title: EvidenceReferenceCreate

EvidenceSearchRequest.description:
Request body for a deterministic indexed-evidence search.

query_text is required (at least two characters). query_type selects the
retrieval mode. filters are optional and metadata-only. limit is bounded to
a safe maximum by the service.
EvidenceSearchRequest.title: EvidenceSearchRequest

EvidenceSearchResult.description:
A single ranked retrieval candidate. excerpt is short, never full text.

chunk_id is populated only for results that come from the real-derived
DocumentChunk search path. Page-text search results leave it unset.
EvidenceSearchResult.title: EvidenceSearchResult

FindingCreate.description:
Request body for a reviewer-created review-support finding.

Every reviewer finding stays under human review. evidence_status and
human_review_status are validated against the review-support vocabulary and
never accept final-decision wording.
FindingCreate.title: FindingCreate

PilotRequestAck.description:
Honest acknowledgement returned after a successful submission.

The request is recorded only. No email is sent, because no email provider is
configured, and no data leaves this system.

message.default: Thanks. Your pilot request was received. This prototype is currently accepting design-partner conversations. We will follow up before requesting any real project files.
message.title: Message

PilotRequestAck.title: PilotRequestAck

PlanConsistencyCheckResult.description: Summary returned when a plan consistency check runs.
PlanConsistencyCheckResult.title: PlanConsistencyCheckResult

PlanConsistencyReviewActionCreate.description:
Request body for recording a review action on a plan consistency finding.

The action must be one of the allowed plan review actions. There is no
action called approve.
PlanConsistencyReviewActionCreate.title: PlanConsistencyReviewActionCreate

PlanConsistencyReviewActionResult.description: The recorded action and the updated plan consistency finding.
PlanConsistencyReviewActionResult.title: PlanConsistencyReviewActionResult

PlanSheetSummary.description: Summary of the plan sheet index for a project.
PlanSheetSummary.title: PlanSheetSummary

ProjectAssignmentUpdate.description: Request body to assign a reviewer to a project.
ProjectAssignmentUpdate.title: ProjectAssignmentUpdate

ProjectCreate.description: Request body for creating a real, user-created project record.
ProjectCreate.title: ProjectCreate

ProjectDetail.description: A project plus aggregate counts of its documents, findings, and events.
ProjectDetail.title: ProjectDetail

ProjectPriorityUpdate.description: Request body to update a project's review priority and due date.
ProjectPriorityUpdate.title: ProjectPriorityUpdate

PromoteCandidateToDraftFindingRequest.description:
Reviewer-confirmed content for a draft finding promoted from a candidate.

Values may be prefilled from the candidate, but the reviewer can edit them.
The risk level is reviewer-entered, never a system conclusion.
PromoteCandidateToDraftFindingRequest.title: PromoteCandidateToDraftFindingRequest

ResponseItemDraftTextUpdate.description: Request body for editing a response item draft text.
ResponseItemDraftTextUpdate.title: ResponseItemDraftTextUpdate

ResponseItemStatusUpdate.description: Request body for updating a response item status.
ResponseItemStatusUpdate.title: ResponseItemStatusUpdate

ResponsePackageNoteCreate.description: Request body for adding a reviewer note to a package or item.
ResponsePackageNoteCreate.title: ResponsePackageNoteCreate

ResponsePackageStatusUpdate.description: Request body for updating a response package status.
ResponsePackageStatusUpdate.title: ResponsePackageStatusUpdate

RetrievalResult.description:
A single retrieval result returned by search and evidence endpoints.

A retrieval result is source evidence for a human reviewer. It is not a
conclusion and never carries final-decision language.
RetrievalResult.title: RetrievalResult

ReviewActionCreate.description:
Request body for recording a human review action.

The action must be one of the allowed review-support actions. There is no
action called approve. Edited fields are optional and only used when the
action is edited.
ReviewActionCreate.title: ReviewActionCreate

ReviewActionResult.description: The recorded action and the updated draft finding it produced.
ReviewActionResult.title: ReviewActionResult

ReviewPacketItemStatusUpdate.description: Request body for updating a packet item status.
ReviewPacketItemStatusUpdate.title: ReviewPacketItemStatusUpdate

ReviewPacketReviewerActionCreate.description: Request body for recording a reviewer action on a packet item.
ReviewPacketReviewerActionCreate.title: ReviewPacketReviewerActionCreate

ReviewPacketReviewerActionResult.description: The recorded action and the updated packet item.
ReviewPacketReviewerActionResult.title: ReviewPacketReviewerActionResult

ReviewPacketTraceabilityReviewRow.description:
A traceability row included in this packet, with reviewer review state.

requires_reviewer_confirmation is true when no reviewer review action has been
recorded for the row. A recorded action confirms the link is useful for review
only; it does not approve or certify anything.
ReviewPacketTraceabilityReviewRow.title: ReviewPacketTraceabilityReviewRow

ReviewerQueueItem.description: A single reviewer queue action across accessible projects.
ReviewerQueueItem.title: ReviewerQueueItem

SheetHotspotSummary.description: Counts of seeded sheet hotspots for a project.
SheetHotspotSummary.title: SheetHotspotSummary

SheetViewerContext.description: A sheet plus the hotspots and related evidence for the viewer.
SheetViewerContext.title: SheetViewerContext

TraceabilityHandoffReadiness.description: Read-only handoff readiness signals. Not a final engineering decision.
TraceabilityHandoffReadiness.title: TraceabilityHandoffReadiness

TraceabilityLatestReviewAction.description: The most recent reviewer review action recorded on a traceability row.
TraceabilityLatestReviewAction.title: TraceabilityLatestReviewAction

TraceabilityPacketContext.description:
Inline review packet context for a traceability row.

It records that a row is included in a review packet for human review. It does
not state the requirement is satisfied or approved.
TraceabilityPacketContext.title: TraceabilityPacketContext

TraceabilityReviewActionCreate.description:
Request body for recording a reviewer review action on a traceability row.

The component IDs identify the row the action applies to and are stored for
transparency. action_type must be a review-support action; there is no action
that approves, certifies, verifies, validates, or marks a requirement
satisfied.
TraceabilityReviewActionCreate.title: TraceabilityReviewActionCreate

WorkflowFollowUpRequestCreate.description: Request body for opening a follow-up request on a workflow item.
WorkflowFollowUpRequestCreate.title: WorkflowFollowUpRequestCreate

WorkflowItemHistory.description: The full recorded history for a single workflow item.
WorkflowItemHistory.title: WorkflowItemHistory

WorkflowItemStatusUpdate.description: Request body for moving a workflow item to a new board status.
WorkflowItemStatusUpdate.title: WorkflowItemStatusUpdate

WorkflowNoteCreate.description: Request body for adding a reviewer note to a workflow item.
WorkflowNoteCreate.title: WorkflowNoteCreate

app__schemas__review_packet__Traceabilit.description: One row in the evidence traceability matrix.
app__schemas__review_packet__Traceabilit.title: TraceabilityRow

info.description: Review-support API for stormwater and land development review. Civil Engineer AI organizes review-support evidence for a human reviewer: browser DXF upload and metadata parsing, CAD intake, plan sheet review, findings and evidence traceability, review packets, a workflow board, draft response packages, resubmittal and DXF metadata revision comparison, and a reviewer command center that aggregates the whole review state. It does not approve plans, certify compliance, verify CAD, validate design, declare a project safe, or close or resolve issues, and there is no action called approve. DXF is the only supported file type; DWG, Autodesk, OCR, and GIS are out of scope. The mock AI provider is the default and no live AI calls are included.
info.title: Civil Engineer AI Backend

get.description: Return the signed-in user's profile and organization membership summary.

schema.title: Response List Run Draft Findings Api V1 Ai Review Runs  Review Run Id  Draft Findings Get
Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

post.description: Set a new password using a valid reset token.

Request a password reset link.

Always returns the same message so the endpoint never reveals whether an
account exists. When the email matches an active account, a reset token is
created and delivered through the mailer. Outside production, the plaintext
token is also returned so local development and tests can complete the flow
without an email provider.

get.description: Return the public plan catalog with advisory limits.

schema.title: Response List Plans Api V1 Billing Plans Get

get.description: Return the honest billing-activation status. No secret is included.

post.description:
Receive and process a Stripe webhook with signature verification.

The raw body and the Stripe-Signature header are verified against
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. An invalid or missing signature is rejected with 400.
Verified events are processed idempotently by event id. No secret, signature,
or raw payload is logged.

post.description:
Start a Stripe Checkout session for the professional plan.

Requires an organization admin. Returns a checkout URL only when Stripe is
fully configured; otherwise returns an honest unavailable response so the UI
shows a disabled state rather than a button that would error. No payment is
processed when Stripe is not configured.

post.description:
Rebuild real-derived chunks for a document from its indexed page text.

This reads the document's indexed page text and produces chunk records for
reviewer support. It does not parse files, OCR, or finalize any review
outcome. The operation is idempotent and never deletes seeded chunks.

schema.title: Response List Pages Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Documents  Document Id  Pages Get

Response List Project Evaluation Cases Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Evaluation Cases Get
Response List Candidates Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Evidence Candidates Get
Response List Project Citations Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Evidence Citations Get

post.description:
Keyword search over real-derived document chunks.

Searches only chunks built from indexed PDF page text. It does not replace
the page-text search and never returns seeded demo chunks. Results carry
page-level citation context for the candidate and citation flow.

Backfill embeddings for the project's real-derived chunks.

Deterministic and local. Skips chunks already embedded with the current
model and unchanged content, refreshes stale-model vectors, and never embeds
empty content. Returns counts only.

Suggest checklist and finding links for real-derived chunks.

Suggestions are reviewer-support only. They do not assert that evidence
satisfies a checklist item and never change a finding or its review status.
